mapper.insert: insert into products values (default, #{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, now(), now())
mapper.select:
select prdt.id as prdt_id, prdt.product_name, prdt.category_id, prdt.price, prdt.created_at as prdt_created_at, prdt.updated_at as prdt_updated_at,
ctgr.id as ctgr_id, ctgr.category_name, ctgr.created_at as ctgr_created_at, ctgr.updated_at as ctgr_updated_at from products prdt inner join categories ctgr on ctgr.id = prdt.category_id order by prdt.id

select prdt.id as prdt_id, prdt.product_name, prdt.category_id, prdt.price, prdt.created_at as prdt_created_at, prdt.updated_at as prdt_updated_at,
ctgr.id as ctgr_id, ctgr.category_name, ctgr.created_at as ctgr_created_at, ctgr.updated_at as ctgr_updated_at from products prdt inner join categories ctgr on ctgr.id = prdt.category_id where prdt.id = #{productId} order by prdt.id

select prdt.id as prdt_id, prdt.product_name, prdt.category_id, prdt.price, prdt.created_at as prdt_created_at, prdt.updated_at as prdt_updated_at,
ctgr.id as ctgr_id, ctgr.category_name, ctgr.created_at as ctgr_created_at, ctgr.updated_at as ctgr_updated_at from products prdt inner join categories ctgr on ctgr.id = prdt.category_id where prdt.product_name = #{productName} order by prdt.id
